ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cleanrooms" (
  "cleanroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleanroom */,
  "iso_class" TEXT /* ISO classification of the cleanroom (e.g., ISO5, ISO6, ISO7, ISO8) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cleanroom */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cleanroom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cleanroom */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the cleanroom in square meters */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Acceptable temperature range for the cleanroom */,
  "humidity_range" TEXT /* Acceptable humidity range for the cleanroom */,
  "pressure_level" TEXT /* Pressure level maintained in the cleanroom */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleanroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cleanrooms_iso_class FOREIGN KEY ("iso_class") REFERENCES iso_classes ("iso_class_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "iso_classes" (
  "iso_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISO class */,
  "iso_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the ISO class (e.g., ISO5, ISO6, ISO7, ISO8) */,
  "particle_limit" INTEGER /* Limit for airborne particles (e.g., 100, 1000, 10000) */,
  "microorganism_limit" INTEGER /* Limit for microorganisms (e.g., 1, 5, 10) */,
  "humidity_limit" TEXT /* Acceptable humidity range for the ISO class */,
  "temperature_limit" TEXT /* Acceptable temperature range for the ISO class */,
  "pressure_limit" TEXT /* Acceptable pressure range for the ISO class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing protocol */,
  "cleanroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cleanroom the protocol is applied to */,
  "testing_method" TEXT /* Method of testing (e.g., air sampling, settle plates, contact plates) */,
  "testing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of testing (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of each testing session */,
  "test_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for triggering an alert */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the last test performed */,
  "next_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_protocols_cleanroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("cleanroom_id") REFERENCES cleanrooms ("cleanroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing protocol the result belongs to */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "particle_count" INTEGER /* Measured value for airborne particles */,
  "microorganism_count" INTEGER /* Measured value for microorganisms */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature during the test */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity during the test */,
  "pressure" TEXT /* Pressure during the test */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the test result triggered an alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES testing_protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fda_regulations" (
  "fda_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FDA regulation */,
  "fda_regulation" TEXT /* Name of the FDA regulation (e.g., FDA.1, FDA.2) */,
  "particle_limit" INTEGER /* Limit for airborne particles (e.g., 1, 5, 10) */,
  "microorganism_limit" INTEGER /* Limit for microorganisms (e.g., 1, 5, 10) */,
  "humidity_limit" TEXT /* Acceptable humidity range for the regulation */,
  "temperature_limit" TEXT /* Acceptable temperature range for the regulation */,
  "pressure_limit" TEXT /* Acceptable pressure range for the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fda_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fda_regulations_particle_limit FOREIGN KEY ("particle_limit") REFERENCES iso_classes ("particle_limit")
)

CREATE TABLE "eu_gmp_regulations" (
  "eu_gmp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EU GMP regulation */,
  "eu_gmp_regulation" TEXT /* Name of the EU GMP regulation (e.g., EU GMP.1, EU GMP.2) */,
  "particle_limit" INTEGER /* Limit for airborne particles (e.g., 1, 5, 10) */,
  "microorganism_limit" INTEGER /* Limit for microorganisms (e.g., 1, 5, 10) */,
  "humidity_limit" TEXT /* Acceptable humidity range for the regulation */,
  "temperature_limit" TEXT /* Acceptable temperature range for the regulation */,
  "pressure_limit" TEXT /* Acceptable pressure range for the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eu_gmp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eu_gmp_regulations_particle_limit FOREIGN KEY ("particle_limit") REFERENCES iso_classes ("particle_limit")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., quality control specialist, production staff, maintenance personnel) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., admin, manager, operator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleanroom_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cleanroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cleanroom being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cleanroom */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the cleanroom was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., entry, exit) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's access */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the cleanroom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cleanroom_access_cleanroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("cleanroom_id") REFERENCES cleanrooms ("cleanroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cleanroom_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
